generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure serving as the physical counterpart for the Digital Twin system."
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, HVACActuator, LightingController
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor deployed to monitor temperature in the physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor deployed to monitor humidity in the physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor deployed to monitor light levels in the physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature sensor data transmitted via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity sensor data transmitted via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level sensor data transmitted via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model enriched with device-specific metadata for sensors, actuators, and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5
]

instance MiddlewareConfigData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for creating and managing building information models"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcess
]

instance HonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables OperationalSimulationService, TwinningProcess
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of environmental conditions and operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization and indoor environmental quality improvements"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionReductionInsight, IndoorEnvironmentalQualityImprovementInsight, AdjustHVACAction, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance OperationalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of operational scenarios using BIM model and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioSimulationInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven automation process involving BIM model validation, extraction of device metadata, and generation of deployable runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelValidationInsight, DeviceMetadataExtractionInsight, RuntimeArtifactGenerationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data insights for building operation monitoring"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReductionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for reducing energy consumption through predictive analytics"
]

instance IndoorEnvironmentalQualityImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for improving indoor environmental quality based on sensor data"
]

instance ScenarioSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from simulating operational scenarios for decision support"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insights for operational understanding"
]

instance BIMModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of BIM model integrity and completeness"
]

instance DeviceMetadataExtractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extraction of device metadata for sensor and actuator integration"
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generation of deployable runtime artifacts for system integration"
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC system based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting levels based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator within Building Control Systems for HVAC adjustment"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller within Building Control Systems for lighting adjustment"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin, such as HVAC adjustments or lighting commands, sent through Eclipse Ditto to actuate Building Control Systems (BCS) components."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange between physical and virtual components, enabling immediate updates and response."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A model-driven framework integrating BIM as the semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, and Unreal Engine for visualization, with modular services connected via standardized extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from design to operation, with the Digital Twin primarily focused on the 'as-operated' phase for real-time monitoring and optimization during building operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess the accuracy of synchronization between the physical asset and its virtual representation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange between physical sensors/actuators and the Digital Twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and model-driven engineering practices for semantic integration and interoperability."
]
